name: aegis-yield-vault
description: AI-driven yield vault strategy for Ranger Build-A-Bear Hackathon. Dynamically allocates USDC across Kamino, Drift, Jupiter Lend, and Marginfi using real-time APY signals and risk gating.

scripts.scan: node node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs -e "import { scanYields } from './yield_scanner.ts'; scanYields().then(p => p.forEach(x => console.log(x.name, x.apy.toFixed(2) + '%')))"
scripts.health: node node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs -e "import { runHealthChecks } from './risk_monitor.ts'; runHealthChecks().then(m => [...m.values()].forEach(h => console.log(h.name, 'risk:', h.riskScore.toFixed(2))))"

author: Nathaniel Crigger
